query:
SELECT COALESCE(article_potential, 'unscored') as tier, COUNT(*) as cnt 
FROM selector_candidates 
WHERE status = 'pending'
GROUP BY article_potential
ORDER BY cnt DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2wfbAGRs7AVLkN4.90cd9747513f --database 4wsqNcW8uBjUqkvadz54Yt --execute SELECT COALESCE(article_potential, 'unscored') as tier, COUNT(*) as cnt 
FROM selector_candidates 
WHERE status = 'pending'
GROUP BY article_potential
